description: BFCL-style parameter correctness test cases for ci-wiki

test_cases.name: Path Format: Company Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for company entities
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for OpenAI company

test_cases.name: Path Format: Product Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for product entities
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for ChatGPT product

test_cases.name: Path Format: Person Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for person entities
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for Sam Altman

test_cases.name: Path Format: Trend Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for trend entities
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for generative AI trend

test_cases.name: Path Slug: Kebab Case Conversion
test_cases.description: Verify page slugs are converted to kebab-case
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for 'Google DeepMind' company

test_cases.name: Path Slug: No Spaces
test_cases.description: Verify page paths do not contain spaces
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for 'Ilya Sutskever' person

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Title Required
test_cases.description: Verify title field is present in frontmatter
test_cases.scenario: Create any page (should have title field)

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Type Required
test_cases.description: Verify type field is present and valid
test_cases.scenario: Create any page (should have valid type)

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Confidence Required
test_cases.description: Verify confidence field is present for ingest operations
test_cases.scenario: Ingest a source and create a page

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Confidence 'high'
test_cases.description: Verify 'high' confidence is correctly assigned
test_cases.scenario: Create a page with multiple credible sources confirming facts

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Confidence 'medium'
test_cases.description: Verify 'medium' confidence is correctly assigned
test_cases.scenario: Create a page with some conflicting sources or partial information

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Confidence 'low'
test_cases.description: Verify 'low' confidence is correctly assigned
test_cases.scenario: Create a page with very limited or contradictory information

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: No Invalid Types
test_cases.description: Verify type is one of: company, product, person, trend
test_cases.scenario: Should reject invalid types like 'organization', 'item', 'person_fake'

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: No Invalid Confidence
test_cases.description: Verify confidence is one of: high, medium, low
test_cases.scenario: Should reject invalid confidence like 'very-high', 'maybe', 'uncertain'

test_cases.name: Content: Cross-Reference Syntax
test_cases.description: Verify wiki cross-references use correct [[type:slug]] syntax
test_cases.scenario: Reference another page: should be [[product:claude]] not [Claude](claude.md)

test_cases.name: Content: Cross-Reference Valid Types
test_cases.description: Verify cross-reference types match valid entity types
test_cases.scenario: Cross-reference should use valid type: [[company:openai]], not [[invalid:openai]]

test_cases.name: Content: Markdown Formatting
test_cases.description: Verify content uses valid Markdown syntax
test_cases.scenario: Content should be valid Markdown (# headers, **bold**, etc.)

test_cases.name: Content: Non-Empty
test_cases.description: Verify page content is not empty
test_cases.scenario: Pages should have meaningful content

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: No Extra Fields
test_cases.description: Verify no hallucinated/extra frontmatter fields
test_cases.scenario: Should only include: title, type, confidence, (optional: description, updated)

test_cases.name: Update: Type Consistency
test_cases.description: Verify page type is not changed on update
test_cases.scenario: Update a 'company' page - type should remain 'company'

test_cases.name: Update: Path Consistency
test_cases.description: Verify page path is not changed on update
test_cases.scenario: Update a page - path should remain unchanged

test_cases.name: Consistency: Path Matches Type
test_cases.description: Verify path directory matches entity type
test_cases.scenario: Company page should be in companies/, product in products/

test_cases.name: Consistency: Title Related to Slug
test_cases.description: Verify title is related to the page slug
test_cases.scenario: Slug 'openai' should have title 'OpenAI' or similar

evaluation_categories.content_format: Tests for Markdown and cross-reference syntax
